name: terminal-ui-design
description: Design workflow for distinctive, accessible, and resilient human-facing terminal interfaces.

metadata.dailyDriver: Install when agents design or refine interactive TUIs, terminal dashboards, wizards, prompts, progress displays, or styled CLI output.
metadata.notFor: Agent-facing command contracts, non-terminal graphical interfaces, or general visual design without a terminal surface.
metadata.scope: Human-facing terminal interaction design, visual hierarchy, degraded output modes, accessibility, responsive layouts, and terminal-state safety.
